stemHtml: At 1000 ft over the sea in overcast, you need to reach a VHF station. No wind, no attenuation. Which station can you reach?

options.a: 120 NM away, antenna at 200 ft AMSL.
options.b: 110 NM away, antenna at 30 ft AMSL.
options.c: 130 NM away, antenna at 550 ft AMSL.
options.d: 140 NM away, antenna at 800 ft AMSL.
